CCS.Notify.NotPlausible: Stunt isn't plausible or flavorful; resolving as a normal roll.
CCS.Notify.AdvantageUsed: You have already used Advantage this combat.
CCS.Notify.PoolSpendFail: Unable to spend Cinematic Pool token.
CCS.Notify.UnsupportedSystem: Creative Combat Stunts: Unsupported system - core will load but effects may be limited.
CCS.Notify.NoActor: Select a token or set a player character, then try again.
CCS.Notify.EffectItemFail: CCS: Could not create temporary effect item.
CCS.Notify.PF2eNoActorTarget: PF2e: No actor or target for Stunt Strike.
CCS.Notify.PF2eNoStrikeRoll: PF2e: Could not access a Strike roll function.
CCS.Notify.AdvantageNoCombat: Advantage is only available during an active combat.
CCS.Setting.Pf2eAdvantageOnce.Name: PF2e: Allow once-per-combat Advantage instead of +2
CCS.Setting.Pf2eAdvantageOnce.Hint: PF2e only. Players may declare roll-twice-keep-higher once per combat instead of a +2 Cool bonus.
CCS.Setting.SuccessRiders.Name: Default Success Rider Menu (PF2e)
CCS.Setting.SuccessRiders.Hint: PF2e only. Comma-separated PF2e conditions with optional :value.
CCS.Setting.FailureSetbacks.Name: Default Failure Setback Menu (PF2e)
CCS.Setting.FailureSetbacks.Hint: PF2e only. Comma-separated entries; for conditions use PF2e slugs.
CCS.Setting.CritPrompt.Name: PF2e: Prompt after Crit
CCS.Setting.CritPrompt.Hint: PF2e only: after a Tactical Risk crit, prompt for Crit Deck vs rider.
CCS.Setting.SkipPlayerDialog.Name: Stunt: Skip PF2e pre-roll dialog for players
CCS.Setting.SkipPlayerDialog.Hint: When enabled, players will NOT see the PF2e pre-roll dialog for stunt rolls. GMs always see it.
CCS.Setting.WeaknessTemplatesMenu.Name: Weakness Templates (CCS)
CCS.Setting.WeaknessTemplatesMenu.Label: Manage Templates
CCS.Setting.WeaknessTemplatesMenu.Hint: Reusable weaknesses you can import into actors.
CCS.UI.PoolDescription: Each player may spend once per encounter. Spend = upgrade (PF2e +1 degree; 5e miss→hit, hit→crit).
CCS.UI.RiderPrompt: Select a rider or cancel to use the default.
CCS.UI.SpendCinematicPool: Spend Cinematic Pool (PF2e: +1 degree; 5e: miss→hit, hit→crit)
CCS.UI.Label: Label
CCS.UI.AdvantageTooltip: Roll twice and keep the higher result for this stunt. Replaces the Flavor (+Cool) circumstance bonus for this roll. Once per encounter.
CCS.UI.TacticalRiskTooltip: Apply a penalty to this stunt's attack roll. Adds an effect on target (success) or self (failure)
